ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation project */,
  "simulation_time" REAL /* Simulation time in picoseconds */,
  "time_step" REAL /* Time step for the simulation */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature for the simulation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the simulation was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the simulation (e.g., running, paused, completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation step */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation project this step belongs to */,
  "step_number" INTEGER /* Step number in the simulation */,
  "total_energy" REAL /* Total energy of the system at this step */,
  "kinetic_energy" REAL /* Kinetic energy of the system at this step */,
  "bonded_energy" REAL /* Bonded energy of the system at this step */,
  "non_bonded_energy" REAL /* Non-bonded energy of the system at this step */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure of the system at this step */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the step was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the step was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the step (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the step failed */,
  "additional_data" TEXT /* Additional metadata or data for the step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_steps_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy component (e.g., Kinetic Energy, Bonded Energy) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the energy component */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the energy component (e.g., kcal/mol) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the component was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "step_energy_values" (
  "step_energy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy value */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation step this energy value belongs to */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the energy component this value corresponds to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the energy component at this step */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the energy value was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the energy value was last updated */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if the value is invalid or failed to compute */,
  "additional_data" TEXT /* Additional metadata or data for the energy value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_energy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_step_energy_values_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES steps ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_step_energy_values_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES energy_components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, simulation engineer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "registered_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the user registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, run) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was logged */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the simulation file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the simulation file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was last updated */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., input, output, log) */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., txt, csv, json) */,
  "uploader_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_files_uploader_id FOREIGN KEY ("uploader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_files_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation setting */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation this setting belongs to */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the simulation setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_settings_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_collaborators" (
  "collaborator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaborator */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation project this collaborator belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a collaborator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the collaborator (e.g., researcher, simulation engineer) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration was last updated */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Permission level of the collaborator (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaborator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_collaborators_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)
